integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the Redmine web interface to perform the triage.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine application, rather than terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) executing API requests.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent genuinely interacted with the issue edit forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively selecting dropdowns (Status, Assignee) and typing/pasting text into the comment boxes.

integrity.description: Verifies the changes were actually saved to the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved issue pages in read-mode with updated history logs and success flash messages (e.g., 'Successful update'), rather than just unsaved text in form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'phoenix-ecommerce' with a milestone named 'v1.0 Launch'. There are two target issues: one containing 'Payment gateway timeout' and another containing 'Login button unresponsive'. The expected assignee for the login issue is 'Carol Santos'.
